identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a unique, emotionally directed creative studio that breaks category conventions.

design_strategy.theme_strategy: Dark Mode First (Creative/Immersive) with Light Mode Toggle
design_strategy.vibe: Glowing, synthetic, aggressive but grounded with matte blacks.
design_strategy.primary_action_color: Electric Orange (#f97316) - To signify creation and energy, avoiding the generic purple/teal.
design_strategy.dashboard_style: Control Room Grid, Dense, Functional Beauty

heading.usage: Landing page headlines, major section titles. Use tight tracking.

body.usage: UI text, paragraphs, inputs. Optimized for legibility.

mono.usage: API keys, code snippets, technical data.

rules: Overlines must be Uppercase + tracking-widest + text-xs.

spacing.base: Generous. Use p-8, p-12 for sections.
spacing.container_padding: p-6 or p-8 for bordered containers.

strategy.marketing: Custom HTML + Tailwind. No Shadcn cards. Use raw divs for asymmetry.
strategy.app: Shadcn components customized with brand colors and radius.

specifics.buttons: Pill shaped. Primary = Electric Orange. Secondary = Ghost/Outline.
specifics.cards: Flat, 1px border, no shadow by default. Hover = lift + glow.
specifics.inputs: Minimalist, bottom border or subtle ring. No heavy backgrounds.

rules: Page transitions: Opacity + slight Y-axis shift.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the design system by first updating the tailwind.config.js and index.css variables. Then build the layout shell. Use the provided image URLs for the gallery and hero sections. Ensure the 'Electric Orange' is used sparingly for high-impact actions only.
